message:
fix(storage,search,tools,guard,cli): panic-safe coalescer, reply attachments, cursor sort, and guard error propagation

- storage: introduce PanicGuard RAII struct in self_process_repo so that
  in-flight and pending batch/spill work is requeued on panic; extract
  coalescer_signal_worker and coalescer_restore_drained_work_on_panic helpers
- search: pre-sort results by cursor_sort_score before applying cursor window,
  fixing page-boundary ordering for both Recency and Relevance ranking modes
- tools: add attachment_paths/convert_images params to reply_message,
  process attachments through the same pipeline as send_message
- guard: propagate git diff-tree and diff fallback failures as Io errors
  instead of silently dropping them
- cli/legacy: fix inverted symlink-vs-broken-symlink check in copy_dir_recursive
- toon: fix truncate_str test expectations to match ellipsis-inclusive semantics
- various: update call-sites for the new reply_message signature (two extra Nones)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
